description: Fix the Sentry plugin to use the configSchema instanceUrl setting for self-hosted instances instead of only supporting sentry.io.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/sentry && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Support self-hosted Sentry instances via instanceUrl config setting
userStories.description: The Sentry plugin declares an optional instanceUrl in configSchema but the API layer only handles sentry.io hostnames. Fix extractOrgSlug and auth detection to work with self-hosted instances.
acceptanceCriteria: extractOrgSlug handles non-sentry.io hostnames by extracting the org slug from the URL path
The urlPatterns in index.ts still works for sentry.io users (backward compatible)
API calls use same-origin relative paths (which work for both sentry.io and self-hosted)
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/sentry/src/sentry-api.ts (fix extractOrgSlug to handle self-hosted hostnames)
- plugins/sentry/src/index.ts (reference for configSchema and urlPatterns)

Context:
The plugin declares configSchema with an optional instanceUrl in index.ts. The urlPatterns only includes `*://*.sentry.io/*`. For self-hosted instances, the platform derives URL patterns from the instanceUrl config setting at runtime, so this is fine.

However, in sentry-api.ts, `extractOrgSlug` (around line 41-49) only matches `*.sentry.io` hostnames:
```typescript
// Typical: org-slug.sentry.io or sentry.io/organizations/org-slug/
const host = window.location.hostname;
if (host.endsWith('.sentry.io') && !host.startsWith('sentry.')) {
  return host.split('.')[0];
}
```

For self-hosted instances (e.g., `sentry.mycompany.com`), this returns null, causing getAuth() to return null, and the plugin reports as unauthenticated.

Fix: When the hostname doesn't match `*.sentry.io`, try to extract the org slug from the URL path (e.g., `/organizations/my-org/...`), or from the page global data. The API calls already use relative paths (`/api/0${endpoint}`), so they'll work for any hostname.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change the urlPatterns or configSchema
- Keep the sentry.io hostname extraction as the primary method
- The API base path `/api/0${endpoint}` is relative to the page origin, which is correct for both sentry.io and self-hosted
